# Release readiness sub-plans

**Conversation context:** release readiness review pre-v0.12.0 (Neotoma conversation `ent_7e5b87441055754918c56ca8` when available).  
**Parent Neotoma report:** `ent_a08b43449a96f8db0387253d`  
**Exported:** 2026-05-14 (reconstructed on branch `fix/issue-queue-99-95-93-97` after `.cursor/plans/` was not present in checkout).

## Status snapshot

| ID | Title | Wave | Status | Notes |
|----|-------|:---:|:---:|---|
| SP-001 | Critical security: UUID bypass + guest userId collapse | 1 | **Completed** | `resolveGuestUserId`; regression tests |
| SP-002 | Peer-sync test coverage | 1 | **Completed** | 20 tests; bodyparser fix for `/sync/webhook` + `/sync/entities` |
| SP-003 | Advisory deprecation (MCP + CLI) + `issues status --issue-number` | 1 | **Completed** | `_deprecation` on MCP; hidden `--advisory` CLI |
| SP-004 | Store relationship tightening (hint + fixture + supplement) | 1 | **Completed** | `superRefine` hint; legacy fixture |
| SP-005 | npm audit fix moderates | 1 | **Completed** | Lockfile |
| SP-006 | Release supplement scaffold v0.12.0 | 1 | **Completed** | `docs/releases/in_progress/v0.12.0/github_release_supplement.md` |
| SP-007 | Security follow-ups (token TTL, SSRF, SVG, fail-closed docs) | 1 | **Completed** | |
| SP-008 | Parity & doc fixes | 1 | **Completed** | `resolveBaseUrl` test; turn_report; tool_descriptions |
| SP-009 | HIGH/MEDIUM test coverage (original) | 1 | **Declined → re-chunked** | Replaced by 9a/9b/9c |
| SP-009a | Subscription tests | 1.5 | **Completed** | unsubscribe, list, events_stream |
| SP-009b | Services unit tests | 1.5 | **Completed** | sync_issues_from_github; entity_submission |
| SP-009c | CLI smoke tests | 1.5 | **Completed** | peers, issues message, backup verify, schemas describe |
| SP-010 | Rename `syncIssuesFromGitHub.ts` → `sync_issues_from_github.ts` | 1 | **Completed** | |
| TYPE-FIX | IssueVisibility advisory seam | 1.5 | **Completed (no-op)** | `type-check` clean; narrowing in `handleSubmitIssue` |
| SP-011 | Monolith splits & dedup | 2 | **Deferred** | Post-release |
| SP-012 | Performance fixes | 2 | **Deferred** | Post-release; prioritize GitHub pagination |

**Wave 1.5 yield (approx.):** 35 new tests across 10 files; several `product_observation` follow-ups filed in Neotoma during test work.

## Remaining tasks (before `/release`)

1. **R1 — Preflight:** `pre_release_checklist.md` — type-check, lint, migrate, doctor, build:server, openapi:bc-diff, contract tests.
2. **R2 — Supplement:** Finalize `docs/releases/in_progress/v0.12.0/github_release_supplement.md` — Breaking changes (include SP-002 inbound sync bug-fix), What's new (SP-007), Deprecations (SP-003), Migration notes (guest token TTL), Known issues (link product observations).
3. **R3 — Release:** Invoke `/release` for v0.12.0 after R1+R2.

## Optional follow-ups (post-release)

- **F1:** Dispatch SP-011 / SP-012 (pagination first on SP-012).
- **F2:** Open GitHub issues from wave-1.5 product observations (subscription schema vs handler, SSE 500 on bad bearer, GitHub sync pagination, submitEntity validation, entity_submission stub, peers `--json` error shape).
- **F3:** Resolve TODO markers in `tests/services/` when production behavior lands.
- **F4:** Materialize parent plan doc from Neotoma report `ent_a08b43449a96f8db0387253d` if a repo copy is desired.

## Universal constraints (for any future sub-agents)

1. Large dirty tree vs HEAD — do not stash/reset pre-existing changes without explicit approval.
2. Do not commit/push/rebase unless asked.
3. Follow `docs/conventions/code_conventions.md` and `docs/architecture/change_guardrails_rules.mdc`.
4. Prefer targeted `npx vitest run <path>` over full suite when parallelizing.
5. Snake_case for new filenames per foundation file_naming rule.
